description: Minimum ilvl from Larzuk to get max sockets on an item. Items found naturally with sockets bypass this.

larzukRule.ilvl_1_25: Up to 3 sockets (or less for small items)
larzukRule.ilvl_26_39: Up to 4 sockets for most items
larzukRule.ilvl_40_plus: Full max sockets for that base

notes: Phase Blade always gets max sockets regardless of ilvl. Shields with 4 sockets need ilvl 26+.
